items.title: Workflow is valid and registers as a non-required PR check on PRs into main
steps: 1. Parse .github/workflows/gemini-pr-review.yml
2. Confirm trigger is pull_request (branches: main) and permissions are contents:read + pull-requests:write
items.expected: YAML parses; job 'review' has the expected steps; not marked a required check anywhere
items.evidence: js-yaml parsed cleanly; job 'review' has 6 steps; no branch protection requires it and job is continue-on-error

items.title: collect-context computes changed + related files and assembles the prompt
steps: 1. BASE_SHA=HEAD~1 HEAD_SHA=HEAD node scripts/pr-review/collect-context.mjs
2. Inspect pr-review-changed.json and pr-review-prompt.md
items.expected: Valid changed-line map; related files resolved and capped; has_changes=true
items.evidence: 19 changed .ts/.tsx files; related 188 capped->40 (logged); has_changes=true; prompt 570KB
items.notes: depcruise non-zero-exit-with-stdout handled so backend related files survive rule violations

items.title: Prompt embeds the Constitution and separates changed (review) from context (do-not-comment) files
steps: 1. grep CHANGED / CONTEXT / Constitution markers in pr-review-prompt.md
items.expected: Constitution text present; changed files under REVIEW, related files under CONTEXT-ONLY
items.evidence: 19 '## CHANGED:' + 40 '## CONTEXT:' sections; constitution embedded; 35 §N.M references present

items.title: post-review drops findings outside the changed lines
steps: 1. Run post-review with GEMINI_SUMMARY containing 2 out-of-range/bogus findings
items.expected: Both findings dropped; nothing posted; exit 0; no network call
items.evidence: parsed 2, dropped 2, 'no valid findings — posting nothing'; exited before any API call

items.title: post-review keeps valid in-range findings and maps them to inline comments
steps: 1. DRY_RUN=1 post-review with 1 valid (in-range) + 1 bogus finding
items.expected: Bogus dropped; valid finding becomes one inline comment on the correct file:line
items.evidence: parsed 2, dropped 1, would post 1 comment on frontend/src/api/websiteAnalytics.ts:40
items.notes: DRY_RUN added for local verification without GitHub API calls

items.title: Review is warn-only — never blocks the merge
steps: 1. Confirm review event is COMMENT (not REQUEST_CHANGES)
2. Confirm job continue-on-error: true and both scripts exit 0 on failure
items.expected: No path can fail the PR or request changes
items.evidence: postBatch/postIndividually use event:COMMENT; job continue-on-error:true; collect-context + post-review both exit 0 on any error

items.title: Model defaults to gemini-3.5-flash via a single override
steps: 1. Confirm env.GEMINI_MODEL = gemini-3.5-flash passed to gemini_model
items.expected: One variable controls the model; default is the confirmed GA Flash ID
items.evidence: workflow env GEMINI_MODEL: gemini-3.5-flash -> gemini_model input

items.title: No changes to the existing deploy workflows
steps: 1. git status --porcelain
items.expected: main.yml / dev.yml / deploy-sandbox.yml untouched; only new files added
items.evidence: git status shows only new paths: .github/gemini/, .github/workflows/gemini-pr-review.yml, scripts/pr-review/, plans/...

items.title: Runbook documents the GEMINI_API_KEY secret and the PR-into-main habit
steps: 1. Open plans/06192026-gemini-pr-review-warn/README.md
items.expected: Setup steps for the secret, the PR habit, tuning, and local dry-run are documented
items.evidence: README.md covers secret setup, PR-into-main flow, tuning knobs, and DRY_RUN local testing

items.title: On a re-push, only the new commits are reviewed; first run / force-push fall back to full
steps: 1. EVENT_ACTION=synchronize BEFORE_SHA=HEAD~1 HEAD_SHA=HEAD collect-context (expect incremental)
2. EVENT_ACTION=opened BASE_SHA=HEAD~3 collect-context (expect full PR)
3. EVENT_ACTION=synchronize with a bogus non-ancestor BEFORE_SHA (expect fallback to full)
items.expected: synchronize diffs before..head; opened/force-push diff base..head
items.evidence: incremental=19 files (last commit); full=20 files (3 commits); bogus before correctly fell back to full
items.notes: concurrency cancel-in-progress:false so a cancelled run never skips a delta

items.title: Clean code produces no comments (empty findings post nothing)
steps: 1. Run post-review with a GEMINI_SUMMARY that yields no valid in-range findings
items.expected: post-review exits without creating a review or any comment
items.evidence: drop-path run logged 'no valid findings — posting nothing' and exited 0 with no API call; prompt hardened with 'Silence is a valid review'
items.notes: model-side empty-result behavior is reinforced by the prompt; observed live on real PRs

items.title: On a live PR, Gemini returns JSON findings
items.precondition: GEMINI_API_KEY secret added; PR opened dev/dave -> main
steps: 1. Add GEMINI_API_KEY repo secret
2. Open a PR into main that changes a .ts/.tsx file
3. Inspect the 'Gemini review' step output
items.expected: Step emits a parseable JSON array of findings
items.notes: Requires the secret + a live PR; cannot be verified locally

items.title: On a live PR, inline comments appear on changed lines only — none on context files
items.precondition: T3 ran on a live PR
steps: 1. Open the PR's Files changed tab
2. Confirm Gemini comments sit on added/changed lines of changed files
3. Confirm no comment lands on a related/context file and the check stays green/neutral
items.expected: Comments scoped to changed lines; merge never blocked
items.notes: Logic is unit-verified (T4a/T4b); live confirmation pending the first real PR
